reason: Defines RuntimeSession, AgentRun, mailbox, frame and launch ownership invariants for the startup model.
Canonical LaunchCommand -> FrameLaunchEnvelope -> LaunchPlan -> PreparedTurn pipeline and accepted boundary requirements.
Durable mailbox envelope, scheduler outcome, consuming lease and recovery contract.
Runtime tool/capability surface rules and provider-visible schema guidance.
Runtime action invocation boundaries and session/setup action separation.
Generated DTO and frontend/backend command projection contract for AgentRun workspace and mailbox.
Incident evidence and commit timeline motivating the architecture convergence.
